name: Tex Mex Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound bulk pork sausage or ground beef
1 to 2 cans red kidney beans, drained
1 pound canned tomatoes, cut into chunks
10 ounce can diced tomatoes with green chilies, Mexican style
1 cup tomato juice or vegetable juice cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook sausage or ground beef and garlic until brown. Drain fat.
2. Stir in chili powder and cumin. Cook for 2 minutes longer.
3. While the meat is cooking, combine beans, celery, onion, green pepper, canned tomatoes, diced tomatoes with chilies, juice, tomato paste, and salt in a crockpot.
4. Add the browned meat mixture to the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours or on High for 4-5 hours.
6. Serve chili in soup bowls. Pass shredded Cheddar cheese and sour cream for topping.
